Hours of Operation Monday - Wednesday: 9:30 - 7:30 PM
 Thursday, Friday and Saturday: 9:30 AM - 5 PM
              Sundays: 2 PM - 5 PM - Labor Day thru Memorial Day    
Our new Library Catalog is live! Learn more. The Paul Pratt Memorial Library will be closed on Monday, May 25th for observance of Memorial Day.

DownloadeBooks & Audio
News & EventsSTAY UP TO DATE
Relax in our new Reading Nooks! Posted on May 5, 2026
We are delighted to share that through the “Making It Public for MAP Municipalities” grant, the Paul Pratt Memorial Library has received two reading nooks by artist Kim Bernard! Additional Info...
Drop-In Social Worker Hours Posted on May 5, 2026
Are you in need of support or are looking for guidance? The Town of Cohasset offers social work services to residents as well as drop-in hours at the library. Learn more about this amazing resource. Additional Info...
Summer Reading is Coming! Posted on May 5, 2026
"PLANT A SEED, READ!" this summer during the Statewide Summer Library Program! Learn more about what's kicking off at the PPML on Monday, June 22nd. Learn More...
American Revolutionary War Painters and Their Politics: 5/26 Posted on May 5, 2026
We’ll explore five of the most prominent American artists during our Revolutionary War; their artistic contributions, as well as their involvement with the politics of the time. Register Here...
Closed for Memorial Day: 5/25 Posted on May 5, 2026
The Paul Pratt Memorial Library will be closed on Monday, May 25 for observance of Memorial Day.
Salad Days - Come Taste the Season: 5/19 Posted on May 5, 2026
We will learn about what the harvest yields at this time of year and share salads, slaws and side dishes to enjoy local produce with Jon from Holly Hill Farm! Register Here...
New! PPML Seed Library Posted on April 10, 2026
We invite you to explore our diverse selection of seeds and see what you can cultivate throughout the year! Click to learn more.
Access to Justice Program Posted on March 19, 2026
The Paul Pratt Memorial Library is proud to partner with the Massachusetts Trial Court System to offer virtual court access through the Access to Justice program. Click to learn more.
Podcasts for Kids Posted on March 17, 2026
Embark on the next exciting journey with podcasts designed for children. These engaging audio experiences cover a wide range of topics, including science, history, stories, music, and much more!
PPML Home Delivery Service Posted on February 12, 2026
Having trouble getting to the PPML? Let us bring the PPML to you! Our dedicated staff is more than happy to come to your home to fulfill your library material requests. Learn more at the link below! Additional Info...
Pavilion Construction Beginning 8/29 Posted on August 28, 2025
Beginning Friday, August 29th, patrons may observe fencing, demolition, and construction activities taking place on Sohier Street.

Which museum would you like to visit? Boston Children's Museum
308 Congress Street Boston, MA 02210 617-426-6500
This coupon is not your ticket. You MUST make a reservation on the Museum's website. 
Wednesday â€“ Monday,
9:00am - 4:00pm 
Please Note: Boston Children's Museum will be closed September 8, 2025 -September 16, 2025 for regularly scheduled Annual Maintenance.
Visit https://bostonchildrensmuseum.org/ticketing
Select â€œDiscount programsâ€
Select "Purchase Discount Program Tickets"
Select "Half Price Library Timed Tickets"
Select the correct date (must match coupon)
Select number of tickets (maximum 4)
Select "Check out" and complete payment
You will be sent tickets via email
The day of your visit, please bring both your coupon from the library and your tickets from the Museum.
Your coupon and tickets can be printed out or shown on a smartphone or other device.
Visit museum website for more information.
Boston Harbor Island Ferry
66 Long Wharf Boston, MA 02110 617-227-4321
This is a 50% discount to the Boston Harbor Islands for up to 4 people. Passes are good between May and October. Please see the island-specific schedule for the 2026 season below.
Visit www.bostonharborislands.org/ferry-tickets to purchase advance tickets. Select the date, time, destination, and number of tickets. Enter the library's code in the "Coupon/Voucher Code" field and click apply to receive the 50% discounted rate. Complete your transaction and bring your phone or printed copy of your barcode to board the ferry!
